text.El tenant o el usuario requiere MFA. Ing: The tenant or user requires MFA. Enter the TOTP code to issue the final session token.
text.JWT bloqueado hasta completar el challen: JWT blocked until the challenge is completed
text.Compliance 360 protege el acceso product: Compliance 360 protects production access with a signed challenge and audit trail for required, successful or failed MFA.
text.Suite corporativa para cumplimiento, cal: Enterprise suite for compliance, quality, risk, audits, CAPA, suppliers, documents, KPIs and executive reports.
text.Development: utilice las credenciales de: Development: use the credentials defined in BootstrapSuperAdmin. The password is not exposed in JavaScript.
text.Gobierno integral de cumplimiento en una: Integrated compliance governance in a single platform
text.Operacion multitenant, seguridad JWT/RBA: Multitenant operations, JWT/RBAC security, append-only audit, live dashboards, scheduled reports and real module actions.
text.Tenant activo, API segura y datos persis: Active tenant, secure API and persistent data.

text.Centro de comando para cumplimiento, cal: Command center for compliance, quality and risk
text.Aplicacion multitenant conectada a datos: Multitenant application connected to real data: documents, suppliers, audits, CAPA, risks, KPIs, reports and security audit in one workspace.
text.Indicadores de cumplimiento y desviacion: Compliance indicators and deviations from the Quality Indicators module.
text.Datasets reutilizables disponibles para: Reusable datasets available for the Enterprise Dashboard.
text.Acceso visual a los dominios productivos: Visual access to the main production domains.
text.JWT, RBAC, tenant enforcement and audit: JWT, RBAC, tenant enforcement and audit context enabled.
text.PostgreSQL persistence with EF Core migr: PostgreSQL persistence with EF Core migrations and tenant-scoped queries.
